title: Mailchimp MCP Server
description: Production-grade MCP server for the Mailchimp Marketing API with 33 tools for campaigns, audiences, members, tags, segments, templates, reports, and automations.

mailchimpApiKey.title: Mailchimp API Key
mailchimpApiKey.description: Your Mailchimp API key in the format 'xxxxxxxxxx-usXX'. Get one at https://mailchimp.com/help/about-api-keys/
